creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
- update devel/p5-Sys-Virt to version 1.1.1
- trim header

CHANGELOG:

- Add all new constants/apis in libvirt 1.1.1
- Add support for v3 of migration APIs
- Fix handling of sparse typed parameters
- Fix misc typos in docs

Fix: --- devel/p5-Sys-Virt/Makefile.orig     2013-07-10 18:23:40.000000000 +0200
+++ devel/p5-Sys-Virt/Makefile  2013-08-20 16:51:42.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,9 +1,7 @@
-# Created by:  Frank Wall <fw@moov.de>
-# $FreeBSD: devel/p5-Sys-Virt/Makefile 322709 2013-07-10 16:23:40Z bapt $
+# $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=      Sys-Virt
-PORTVERSION=   1.0.3
-PORTREVISION=  1
+PORTVERSION=   1.1.1
 CATEGORIES=    devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=  CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= p5-
--- devel/p5-Sys-Virt/distinfo.orig     2013-03-20 07:41:52.000000000 +0100
+++ devel/p5-Sys-Virt/distinfo  2013-08-20 16:51:56.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Sys-Virt-1.0.3.tar.gz) = 0ad25b7556275410ff3e4f4019c5a2041fffbe998dd53911db7b8dee0c894acb
-SIZE (Sys-Virt-1.0.3.tar.gz) = 92652
+SHA256 (Sys-Virt-1.1.1.tar.gz) = 161f93cf18219dcbb137d4736c4485b32640813fc495d5be557f58bbf44e6f48
+SIZE (Sys-Virt-1.1.1.tar.gz) = 94938


Patch attached with submission follows:
